title: Project — Written Communication
topics: informal email · formal email · complaint · CV summary · review
description: Projekt: formální a neformální psaný projev.

vocabulary.en: I look forward to hearing from you
I am writing to express my dissatisfaction
I would be grateful if you could

notes: \n ✓ Check: Did you use connectors? Correct level of formality?
tasks: 1. Write all three texts above (informal email, formal email, complaint)
2. Exchange with a language partner for peer feedback
3. Write a short online product review (positive and negative) — 80 words each
